978.label: 978 · HDR 30° (기준)

Do not pair icp_transform_978.npy with meas_battery_roi.ply or meas_battery_tight.ply for NN evaluation
Inside the currently recommended operating window

remaining_biases: Seam seeds originated from meas978 before ref-surface snapping
Each capture is still evaluated with its own ICP transform

meas_battery_roi_ply.reason: Using this with icp_transform_978.npy reproduces meaningless NN scores around 120-148mm

meas_battery_tight_ply.reason: Using this with icp_transform_978.npy reproduces meaningless NN scores around 145-148mm
